task_completion.description: Verify that the bookmarks have been organized into the four specified folders on the bookmarks bar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Chrome bookmarks bar or Bookmark Manager showing exactly four folders named 'Crop Science', 'Livestock & Veterinary', 'Extension Programs', and 'Personal'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the required Chrome flags are enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the chrome://flags page showing 'Smooth Scrolling', 'Parallel downloading', and 'Back-forward cache' set to 'Enabled'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the accessibility font sizes are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Chrome Customize Fonts settings page showing Standard/Default font size at 20, Fixed-width font size at 18, and Minimum font size at 14.

task_completion.description: Verify that the custom search engines 'usda' and 'ext' have been established.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Chrome Search Engines settings page showing 'usda' and 'ext' added under Site search or Custom search engines.

task_completion.description: Verify that the homepage and startup pages are set to the specified USDA URLs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Chrome settings showing the Home button enabled with 'https://www.nifa.usda.gov' as the custom web address, and the 'On startup' settings configured to 'Open a specific page or set of pages' with 'nifa.usda.gov' and 'ers.usda.gov' listed.

task_completion.description: Verify that the download directory and prompt settings are configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Chrome Downloads settings page showing the Location set to a path ending in 'Documents/Extension_Bulletins' and the toggle for 'Ask where to save each file before downloading' turned ON.

task_completion.description: Verify that password saving, address autofill, and payment methods are disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Chrome Autofill and Passwords settings showing toggles turned OFF for 'Offer to save passwords', 'Save and fill addresses', and 'Save and fill payment methods'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Chrome graphical user interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating through Chrome settings menus and clicking toggles/inputs, rather than using terminal commands to directly edit Chrome's JSON Preferences file.

integrity.description: Ensure the bookmarks bar items are actual folders.
integrity.visual_evidence: The items named 'Crop Science', etc., on the bookmarks bar should have folder icons or show a dropdown menu of multiple links when clicked, rather than being single renamed bookmark links.

integrity.description: Ensure the settings shown are genuine Chrome settings pages.
integrity.visual_evidence: The URL bar should display 'chrome://settings/...', 'chrome://flags', or 'chrome://bookmarks' when configuring these options, not a local HTML file or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Bookmark Folders required: 'Crop Science', 'Livestock & Veterinary', 'Extension Programs', 'Personal'. Flags to enable: smooth-scrolling, parallel-downloading, back-forward-cache. Fonts: default 20, fixed 18, min 14. Search engines: 'usda' (https://search.usa.gov/search?affiliate=usda&query=%s) and 'ext' (https://search.extension.org/search?q=%s). Homepage: https://www.nifa.usda.gov. Startup pages: nifa.usda.gov, ers.usda.gov. Download directory: ~/Documents/Extension_Bulletins. Note: There are exactly 29 bookmarks to organize, despite the prompt mentioning 30.
